description: Full Stack GTM provides software and services for auditing, cleaning, and governing CRM and go-to-market data. Its open-source toolkit lets agents and operators inspect CRM data and stage approval-gated change plans before writing back to connected systems.
summary: fullstackgtm.com exposes a hosted OAuth-protected MCP server and publishes an open-source `fullstackgtm` CLI plus local stdio MCP entrypoint for CRM/GTM operations.

surfaces.name: Full Stack GTM hosted MCP server
